title: Heraklion Heat Wave
lead: Heraklion is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.20. This extreme weather event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Heraklion has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 22%, which is relatively low, but the strong winds of 31.8 km/h are not providing much relief. 
 The city's infrastructure is under strain, with the heat wave expected to continue in the coming days, posing significant risks to residents and visitors alike.
conclusion: Activation of emergency heat wave protocols is recommended immediately.
